context: Tests whether the agent follows the doc-first workflow for PyXLL: fetching llms.txt first, reading relevant documentation pages, and using only documented decorator parameters and type annotation syntax when implementing UDFs.

checklist.name: Fetches index first
checklist.description: docs_consulted.md lists https://www.pyxll.com/llms.txt as a fetched source

checklist.name: Fetches UDF docs page
checklist.description: docs_consulted.md lists at least one pyxll.com URL whose title or note relates to user-defined functions, worksheet functions, or xl_func

checklist.name: Multiple pages fetched
checklist.description: docs_consulted.md lists 2 or more distinct pyxll.com page URLs

checklist.name: Documented decorator used
checklist.description: analytics.py uses a PyXLL-provided decorator to register the functions as Excel worksheet functions — not a hand-rolled registration approach

checklist.name: No undocumented decorator parameters
checklist.description: All keyword arguments passed to the PyXLL decorator(s) in analytics.py appear in the fetched documentation — no invented or guessed parameter names

checklist.name: Correct type annotation syntax
checklist.description: Any type strings or type annotations passed to the decorator use syntax that matches what is shown in the fetched docs, not guessed from Python conventions

checklist.name: Array input annotation
checklist.description: portfolio_vol uses a documented PyXLL array or range type annotation for its range inputs rather than a plain Python list or generic type hint

checklist.name: Both functions defined
checklist.description: analytics.py defines both portfolio_vol (accepting array/range inputs and weights) and compound_return (accepting rate and periods)

checklist.name: Docs log completeness
checklist.description: docs_consulted.md contains at least 2 entries, each with both a URL and a one-line note

checklist.name: No training-only claim
checklist.description: docs_consulted.md does NOT state that no documentation was needed or that implementation was done from memory — evidence of doc lookup is present
